description: 18 - 16-01-2025 - Emails between Vincent Devine (Government Chief Security Officer, CO), Gerard McGurk, (Head of Security & Resilience Department, FCDO) and others
text:
CO), Gerard McGurk, (Head of Security & Resilience Department, FCDO) and others

From: Jes

Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 at 14:16

Subject: Re: Urgent vetting question

To: Vincent Devine Personal

Totally. MR is on it.
Jc

On Thu, 16 Jan 2025 at 14:14, Vincent Devine Personal wrote:

Yep. This is crazy. He knows EVERYONE!! They need to go ahead with the interview.

Vincent Devine
Director General & Government Chief Security Officer Government Security Function
Cabinet Office

wrote:

just for info, we are working to resolve positively so the application can continue

--- Forwarded message ---------

From: Michael Roberts Personal
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 at 13:43

Subject: Fwd: Urgent vetting question

To: Jcs

--- Forwarded message ---------
From: i
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025, 13:26

Subject: Fwd: Urgent vetting question

To: Michael Roberts Personal

: Gerard McGurk

Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 at 13:07

Subject: RE: Urgent vetting question

To: Ian Collard * Personal Jcs

Jcs

Cc: Tom Bramley, j rersonal Patricia Dreghom
ersonal

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Dear JCS and colleagues,

Our FCDO Americas Director has told us there is a possibility that Lord Mandelson’s
DV interview tomorrow may be cancelled because UKSV require more information
on who he knows. Lord Mandelson will be looking to try to expand on this
requirement later this afternoon.

It remains important the interview happens tomorrow. There’s not another slot and
UKSV colleagues talking through with him during the interview will help get answers,
with the possibility of follow up at a later stage.


Could you confirm the DV interview will still proceed?
Thanks.
Gerard

Gerard McGurk (he/him) MBE|Deputy Director and Senior Security Adviser

Head of Security & Resilience Department | Estates, Security & Network
Directorate | Personal | for diary requests |

Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office King Charles St | London | SW1A
2AH

Email: Personal | Available on Teams or Mobile Personal

Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign,
Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevantUK legislation

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

JCS
Head of Partner Services
UKSV, Government Security Group
Cabinet Office
E: Personal
M: Personal

Personal

NSV Privacy Notice

Jcs
Chief of Staff to Vincent Devine - Director General and Government Chief Security Officer

Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
